title: Accenture (ACN) Announces the Acquisition of ATI Solutions
text: The acquisition will help strengthen Accenture's (ACN) digital technology and automation capabilities in West Australia.

title: Accenture Acquires ATI Solutions Group to Help Clients in Australia Automate Field Operations Faster and More Efficiently
text: PERTH, Australia--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Accenture has acquired ATI Solutions Group (ATI), a Perth-based consulting service provider to the mining, energy and rail industries.

title: The 3 Most Undervalued Tech Stocks to Buy Now: August 2023

title: CRAI or ACN: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?

title: EY to cut jobs in UK as economic woes continue to bite
text: Ernst & Young is poised to make another round of job cuts, this time hitting staff in its UK branch. Though less severe than April's cuts, EY is set to make around 150 redundancies, equating to over 5% of its UK-based financial services consulting wing.

title: 3 Machine Learning Stocks You Better Be Buying on Each and Every Dip
text: In an era when data reigns supreme, few sectors shine as brightly as that of machine learning. Leading machine learning stocks are carving out a notable niche for tech-savvy investors.

title: Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan and Accenture to Establish Joint Venture
text: TOKYO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan and Accenture will form a joint venture to streamline Coca-Cola Bottlers Japan's administrative and back-office operations.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Performance Since Launch
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF™, with a few minor twists. The portfolio gained 2.44% in July, underperforming the S&P 500 by 0.77%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 14.72%. Since inception, the portfolio is generating 2.75% of alpha over the S&P 500.

title: Goldman Sees $1.5 Trillion Flowing To AI. Here's Where To Invest

title: Accenture Completes Acquisition of Anser Advisory
text: NEW YORK & SANTA ANA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Accenture has completed the acquisition of Anser Advisory, an advisory and management company for infrastructure projects in the United States.

title: Accenture: A Great Opportunity To Sell At The Current Price And Profit Off March Lows
text: Accenture gets Sell rating today, seen as great opportunity to profit from the March price dip. Valuation is higher than sector average, dividend yield lower than sector average, share price well above 200 day SMA. Net income YoY positive growth, capital & liquidity situation healthy.

title: If You Can Only Buy One Machine Learning Stock, It Better Be One of These 3 Names
